---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to cf-monitor
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating or missing?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Include code examples if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, or references to similar features in other tools.
